params.name: Tetrabiblos

params.description:
On Mar 5, AD 139, Ptolemy completed this famous ancient Greek astrological treatise.

Ptolemy wrote Tetrabiblos and proposed the idea of a geocentric universe. He completed the work based on Aristotle's theory. This book is based on Greek cosmology, including the observations on the universe and the theory of Humorism in the Hippocratic era. Ptolemy drew connections between the nature of celestial bodies with the fluids of the human body and analyzed how the movement of celestial bodies affects  …
